name: 前任背叛與復仇
description: 女主三年默默支持前男友，對方功成名就後立刻拋棄她另攀高枝。衝突核心是「付出不被認可」的憤怒，復仇線則提供持續的爽感回報。

examples.drama_title: [FULL HD] She Married a Homeless CEO?! | Full Mini Drama HD | Romantic Comedy Series
examples.excerpt: When your landlord kicked you out, I found a new place for you. When you got fired from the start group, I funded your startup company and got new clients for you. / All right, Arjie was the one who invested in my fun. You're just a delivery girl and here you are taking credit for everything.
examples.context: 女主三年默默支持前男友，對方功成名就後立刻拋棄她另攀高枝。衝突核心是「付出不被認可」的憤怒，復仇線則提供持續的爽感回報。
